header.title: Compliance, KPIs & Audits
header.subtitle: Standards coverage, continuous improvement, and training records

iso27001.infoText1: The ISO/IEC 27001 standard defines the criteria for a robust Information Security Management System (ISMS).
iso27001.infoText2: All active assets of the organization are subject to risk assessments and require the definition of technical and organizational measures (TOMs).

nis2.noAssets: Currently no assets marked as NIS-2 relevant.
nis2.infoText1: The NIS-2 directive serves to establish a high common level of cybersecurity across the European Union.
nis2.infoText2: Operators of critical or important entities must take appropriate and proportionate security measures.

gdpr.gapText: The assets listed below process personal data but do not yet have a complete ROPA (VVT) entry. This is a legal requirement.
gdpr.noGaps: All assets processing personal data have a complete ROPA (VVT) entry. No GDPR gaps detected.
gdpr.noAssets: No assets with personal data processing found.
gdpr.infoText1: The General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) regulates the protection of personal data.
gdpr.infoText2: Any asset processing personal data must be documented with an entry in the Record of Processing Activities (ROPA/VVT).

kpiSection.title: Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
kpiSection.noKpis: No KPIs defined yet. Define metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of your controls.

assignModal.uploadFormatName: Name — First and last name of the participant (text column)
assignModal.uploadFormatDesc: Column order is arbitrary. Rows without name and email will be skipped. Known users will be automatically mapped by name or email, unknown entries will be recorded as external participants.
